subject: [tasks-system-redesign] [P1] Rename shared types and schemas from Pulse to Tasks
description:
Rename all Pulse-related types, schemas, and interfaces in `packages/shared/src/schemas.ts` and `packages/shared/src/relay-envelope-schemas.ts`.

## Changes in `packages/shared/src/schemas.ts`

Rename the following identifiers:

| Current | New |
|---|---|
| `PulseScheduleStatusSchema` | `TaskStatusSchema` |
| `PulseScheduleStatus` | `TaskStatus` (note: there is already a `TaskStatus` type for session tasks — it must be renamed first to `SessionTaskStatus` or removed if unused) |
| `PulseRunStatusSchema` | `TaskRunStatusSchema` |
| `PulseRunStatus` | `TaskRunStatus` |
| `PulseRunTriggerSchema` | `TaskRunTriggerSchema` |
| `PulseRunTrigger` | `TaskRunTrigger` |
| `PulseScheduleSchema` | `TaskSchema` |
| `PulseSchedule` | `Task` |
| `PulseRunSchema` | `TaskRunSchema` |
| `PulseRun` | `TaskRun` |
| `PulsePresetSchema` | `TaskTemplateSchema` |
| `PulsePreset` | `TaskTemplate` |
| `CreateScheduleRequestSchema` | `CreateTaskRequestSchema` |
| `UpdateScheduleRequestSchema` | `UpdateTaskRequestSchema` |
| `ListRunsQuerySchema` | `ListTaskRunsQuerySchema` |
| `CreateScheduleInput` | `CreateTaskInput` |
| `CreateScheduleRequest` | `CreateTaskRequest` |
| `UpdateScheduleRequest` | `UpdateTaskRequest` |
| `ListRunsQuery` | `ListTaskRunsQuery` |

Also update the `.openapi()` display names to match (e.g., `.openapi('PulseSchedule')` becomes `.openapi('Task')`).

**IMPORTANT:** There is an existing `TaskStatus` type at line ~24 of schemas.ts used for session tasks (`'pending' | 'in_progress' | 'completed'`). This collides with the Pulse rename. Rename the existing session task status to `SessionTaskStatus` / `SessionTaskStatusSchema` and update all references (search for `TaskStatus` and `TaskStatusSchema` across the codebase — primarily used in session-related code).

## Changes in `packages/shared/src/relay-envelope-schemas.ts`

Rename:
- `PulseDispatchPayloadSchema` -> `TaskDispatchPayloadSchema`
- `PulseDispatchPayload` -> `TaskDispatchPayload`
- Update `.openapi('PulseDispatchPayload')` -> `.openapi('TaskDispatchPayload')`
- Inside the schema, rename `scheduleId` field to `taskId` and `scheduleName` field to `taskName`
- Update the `type` literal from `'pulse_dispatch'` to `'task_dispatch'`

## Changes in `packages/shared/src/transport.ts`

Rename the Transport interface methods:

| Current | New |
|---|---|
| `listSchedules()` | `listTasks()` |
| `createSchedule(opts)` | `createTask(opts)` |
| `updateSchedule(id, opts)` | `updateTask(id, opts)` |
| `deleteSchedule(id)` | `deleteTask(id)` |
| `triggerSchedule(id)` | `triggerTask(id)` |
| `listRuns(opts?)` | `listTaskRuns(opts?)` |
| `getRun(id)` | `getTaskRun(id)` |
| `cancelRun(id)` | `cancelTaskRun(id)` |
| `getPulsePresets()` | `getTaskTemplates()` |

Update the section comment from `// --- Pulse Scheduler ---` to `// --- Tasks ---`.
Update all TSDoc comments to say "Task" instead of "Pulse schedule".
Update parameter and return types to use the new type names (`Task`, `TaskRun`, `TaskTemplate`, `CreateTaskInput`, `UpdateTaskRequest`, `ListTaskRunsQuery`).

Also update `packages/shared/src/types.ts` re-exports if they reference any of the old names.

## Acceptance Criteria
- No references to `PulseSchedule`, `PulseRun`, `PulsePreset`, `PulseDispatchPayload`, `listSchedules`, `createSchedule`, etc. remain in `packages/shared/src/`
- `pnpm typecheck` will show errors in downstream packages (expected — those are fixed in subsequent tasks)
- The existing session `TaskStatus` has been renamed to `SessionTaskStatus` to avoid collision
activeForm: Renaming shared types and schemas from Pulse to Tasks
